svg.title: SANKALP Defence Ontology Platform — Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Multi-agent pipeline: Ganana ingests CSV data, Shodhan transforms to gold store, Bandhan builds Neo4j knowledge graph, Bhavishyavani scores readiness, Darshan renders the Streamlit dashboard. Three branches: IAF, Army, Navy.
svg.text: IAF · Army · Navy | Python · Neo4j · Streamlit

g.text: IAF · Army · Navy · Ontology · Alerts · Admin
